_doc: Pre-registered fixed JP scan universe for the observe_only disclosure-feature pipeline.
_criterion: TSE Prime/Standard companies selected from a 2026-06-11 public-market snapshot: market capitalization JPY 50bn-500bn, three-month average daily turnover at least JPY 300m, diversified across TSE industries, and excluding every ticker present in holdings.json at pin time. Candidate names came from the JPX TOPIX Small 1 constituent file; market cap and turnover were then checked mechanically. Analyst coverage <=5 is preferred when public coverage data is available. News, social media, and recent price moves are never selection inputs.
_why_fixed: A fixed, book-independent universe prevents selection bias in rank-IC and Deflated-Sharpe validation. Holdings were used only as an exclusion set at the pin date, never as a source of candidates.
_selection_source: JPX TOPIX constituent file dated 2026-04-30 plus 2026-06-11 Yahoo Finance market-cap/three-month-volume snapshot
_spend_note: TDnet/EDINET metadata and deterministic parsers are free. DeepSeek extraction remains --live opt-in and skip_existing prevents repeat spend.
_loanable_note: null means not yet confirmed from the configured JPX source and is fail-safe untradeable for short certification.
